result: The raw survey datasets have been processed to derive BMI at ages 25 and 32. The script loaded the necessary tab-delimited files, merged them by NSID, handled missing values according to the standard scheme (converting NAs to -3), and extracted the variables W8DBMI and W9DBMI as bmi_25 and bmi_32 respectively. The final output containing NSID and these two derived variables has been saved to data/output/cleaned_data.csv.
